questionHtml:
Which cell component synthesizes actin and myosin?

A. Free ribosomes

B. Rough endoplasmic reticulum

C. Smooth endoplasmic reticulum

D. Nuclear membrane

meta.title: Which cell component synthesizes actin and myosin? A. Free ribosomes B. Rough endoplasmic reticulum C. Smooth endoplasmic reticulum D. Nuclear membrane
